title: Frontend Development for Vueling Airlines in Newshore
description: Engineering high-traffic interfaces and webapps for Vueling Airlines, with modular components, Design Systems and REST APIs within a SCRUM environment.
body:
At **Newshore**, I worked as a senior frontend engineer integrated in the **Vueling Airlines** project, contributing to the development of the interfaces and webapps of the low-cost airline of reference in Spain.

## High traffic interfaces

Vueling is a platform with millions of users and very demanding performance requirements. The work involved building and maintaining components that function flawlessly under high loads, across multiple devices and languages.

## Modular architecture and Design System

Worked on a large-scale **Design System**, defining reusable components with structured **SCSS** and modular **JavaScript**. Each piece had to be visually and functionally consistent with the rest of the system.

## Tooling and integration of APIs

The build flow was managed with **Node.js** and **NPM**, automating compilation, linting and deployment. The components were integrated with **REST APIs** for flight finders, booking management and the user account, using **Angular** as the main framework.

## Methodology

The entire project followed **SCRUM** methodology, with regular sprints, planning meetings and systematic code reviews.

## Technologies

- JavaScript
- Node.js
- NPM
- SCSS
- HTML5
- REST APIs
- Angular
- Git

Client: [vueling.com](https://vueling.com)
